creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
Because the last time a FreeBSD committer went ahead and created a suricata-devel port unbeknownst to us. We do work with Suricata team to ensure test coverage for FreeBSD when they cannot and just spoke to them last week about the next major update timeline. While version 7 isn't ready from a QA perspective we would also like to encourage users to try the patch and avoid duplicate submissions and port splits in the meantime.


Cheers,
Franco
